entries.gt_166a66979744bd: The Carnivorous Mycelium feeds on corpses. Salt snuffs it, fire opens the passage, and raw zhelemish is cut only if you are ready to pay with skin.
entries.gt_006db463989e32: The central circle collapsed empty. The plate burned out before the nightmare.
entries.gt_00c52a238546c4: The ash plate stayed behind. The waves will start without your preparation.
entries.gt_0636d0cb807b9b: The side passages opened: shadows are coming from the flanks, and the rear cultists raised hooks.
entries.gt_3175826cc7692e: The central circle collapsed. The Nightmare is coming alone: keep a rib between you and the center.
entries.gt_8239fecc207815: The ash plate went dark. A hook, a rune, and a charge remain in the center; the yellow exit is clear.
entries.gt_841c156d517243: eyes hold the far line; yellow burns lead to the exit
entries.gt_ab59e8ecdc55dc: The side passages flared, but the second wave found no living target.
entries.gt_ca51d9b6b3c24b: Behind the door is the ash plate: drop the eyes and cultists first, keep a rib between you and the center.
entries.gt_e3c8e9cb1234ad: The ash plate switched on. Yellow burns on the floor lead to the exit, about ${escapeDist} cells away.
entries.gt_e475f414209a45: The ash plate switched on: distant eyes hold the center, ribs give cover, and the yellow trace leads outward.
entries.gt_033cb9e98de562: Choir Mother of the Meat Threshold
entries.gt_074b3352c4226a: If the choir goes quiet, do not stand still. After the pause, shadows climb out of the side wall.
entries.gt_10aea5c555912f: Proof from below: the voice from the PSI till was carried out of the choir.
entries.gt_1e7d8f1524abbe: They are already writing our surnames on the sign by syllables. Time to go.
entries.gt_1f440408c49342: The till accepted the meat. PSI pressure dropped, but Pakhom remembered your change.
entries.gt_377c491991d475: The Liquidator was led out by word. Now move fast: the hot passage does not stay open long.
entries.gt_3acaaf85141c55: Three pieces of meat into the till, and you pass without a fight.
entries.gt_3efb9ebb21fdb0: The idol holds the signal on the till. Break it, and upstairs they will believe we did not simply vanish.
entries.gt_438a1d33e743b9: If I get out, I will tell them upstairs: down here they take meat, cartridges, and people.
entries.gt_465ed185a507e9: You can pay with meat. You can beat the idol. You can carry away the wounded man. You cannot wait.
entries.gt_4db926e9482593: Arseny knows the hot passage. Tell him I am alive until proven otherwise.
entries.gt_52315db53ac678: The till is nearby. Steal carefully: the floor is wet, tracks remain.
entries.gt_52d9a156ef1a3b: Outcome from below: the meat tax is paid, the fight is postponed.
entries.gt_571a29ae4f3307: Arseny Burnt: "Break the Meat Choir's signal idol. One idol, one exit, no second wave."
entries.gt_5b8502c8626a42: Meat Choir ledger: 3 pieces of raw meat open the passage without a fight. Do not open the Voice in a Jar by the idol.
entries.gt_664bd6c7941d0e: The refusal plate clicked. The meat stayed with you, but a Shadow is rising nearby.
entries.gt_84d35229a0beaa: Arseny's coal: two lamps in a row lead to the exit. If you hear a third, you are back at the ash plate.
entries.gt_87496cec6bc7bb: Pakhom Meat Tax: "Three pieces of raw meat into the choir till. Pay in meat and you save cartridges."
entries.gt_9d1a6c317c05c0: Corporal Shramko: "Give Arseny the sign to the exit. He is {dir}. Do not linger: this is evacuation, not cleanup."
entries.gt_a4e65d176e330a: Two lamps in a row are my way out. The third one already lies; there is the ash plate.
entries.gt_a7e909a489b030: Accepted. I am leading him through the hot passage while the choir is busy with you.
entries.gt_be8a7d2b293652: The tax is closed. Now run to the hot passage before the plates switch on again.
entries.gt_cb1fc63e4d9d25: Refusal plate: do not pay in meat, and you get a PSI hit and a shadow by the exit. No signature required.
entries.gt_ce328244b04742: Outcome from below: the last liquidator received a path to the exit.
entries.gt_d4582ec931dd4d: Shramko's log: group written off, cartridges nearly written off, but proof from below can still be carried upstairs.
entries.gt_d86ba7df545816: The group is gone. I survived because I was buried under the ribs and not finished off.
entries.gt_da747526816692: Pakhom Meat Tax: "Bring the Voice in a Jar from the till. Keep it, and you get a reward without me; hand it over, and you get a stabilizer."
entries.gt_dfcd4838293014: You can turn the Voice in a Jar in to me for a stabilizer. Keep it, and you will fight them off yourself.
entries.gt_e51934e364f2d0: Proof from below: the Meat Choir's signal plate is broken.
entries.gt_e541e35d877985: Do not open the jar by the idol. A new ledger will trigger, and the guards will climb out again.
entries.gt_e841829917d8f0: The till is open. The contents are yours, but the arrears called a Beast, an Eye, and a Shadow.
entries.gt_eb4b1ef52cf6b1: The idol is down. You take a PSI hit; an Eye and a Shadow are coming from the walls.
entries.gt_ff783441986738: Do not stand under the choir. The plates count steps there; the exit is cheaper to open with meat.
entries.gt_6a4bbc1bf8b2b4: ${spec.name}: a return loop is visible near the entrance. Check your retreat before the fight.
entries.gt_6cd93b16364a46: there is a retreat loop before the pocket and a separate reward shelf
entries.gt_a01b0de4f412ea: ${spec.name}: retreat loop found. The reward shelf stands apart from the meat pocket.
entries.gt_a9f6d83ed20447: ${spec.name}: the threshold remains without a checked retreat.
entries.gt_03b6e9a61cfe02: The staff glows while there is PSI. After that it is just a stick with a bad reputation.
entries.gt_16b859fdf4dd06: The impulse slipped. Sorry: the instruments here beep before the hands.
entries.gt_1a1d255f46f50f: You see these monsters too? Then the recording in my head is not completely lying.
entries.gt_89943a2e955f41: Cover first, words after. Yakov would sign it if the paper were not sweating.
entries.gt_8e1eb63f4bcfd5: Down below, promises are charged in water, bandages, and cartridges.
entries.gt_9126a0f9c87bb2: Thank you for listening. Now at least it is clear where not to go.
entries.gt_971fc9556f0296: The PSI duty officer retreats first if the hermodoor still holds.
entries.gt_98544f43e5153d: The light will not reach every corner. Then at least let it reach the one where we are standing now.
entries.gt_b26cd66f23efd9: The log says: lower PSI post, wet filter, do not go in first. The log is soaked, but the point is right.
entries.gt_e887c90b9debcc: For now a dry filter, an intact door, and an exit without someone else's sign would be enough.
entries.gt_f4b6c95f687de8: Is my staff beeping in your voice? Then hit my hand: the impulse was intercepted.
entries.gt_f5b480f73817dc: I will keep the staff charged. Words later.
entries.gt_05252d462eaf0a: The Myasomer did not wake: the quiet edge gave a reward without shadows.
entries.gt_2008e59cbd3dff: A rapid pulse started in the wall. One more loud step will raise the shadows.
entries.gt_26f28677bcc542: The Myasomer caught the second noise. The next noise will release a shadow and assemblies.
entries.gt_34893cb0efa24a: The Myasomer reacts to noise in the center. Go along the edge, throw bread into the meat pit, and burn the vein only with no extra loot nearby.
entries.gt_35dfd82e05f41c: The central vein reacts to noise. Go along the edge, throw bread into the pit, or burn out the vein.
entries.gt_3acfdebd9fe7de: The Myasomer is down: the noise corridor no longer holds a threat.
entries.gt_55caa6ee5a3eee: The Myasomer broke loose, but the burned vein released only assemblies.
entries.gt_72642fc8e952ca: The Myasomer broke loose, but the bait pulled the first shadow aside.
entries.gt_80d189a6fb1394: Fire dried the hearing vein. One noise can be written off.
entries.gt_a994a9db86a361: The Myasomer is distracted by bait: the next noise gives less pressure.
entries.gt_ac7de4d0229168: If you go along the soft edge, the vein only twitches. The Myasomer did not wake.
entries.gt_bd2c11d1f0e533: The Myasomer broke loose on the noise: threats ${Number(data.spawned) || 0}/${Number(data.threatCap) || MAX_THREATS}, retreat along the edges.
entries.gt_c1aa413e53a530: The bait fell into the meat pit. The next lunge will go there.
entries.gt_d90895098b7cbf: The Myasomer broke loose on the noise. A shadow and assemblies came out of the wall.
entries.gt_d95ef7247c9774: The meat vein is burned out: the noise is written off, the threat cap is lower.
entries.gt_ddecd1ffd2a5d2: The Myasomer heard noise ${Number(data.triggers) || 1}/3: leave by the edge, throw bait, or burn the vein.
entries.gt_f24b9aada7c103: Siren Shard on a Tin Vein
entries.gt_f607d1292c6147: The Myasomer is down. It no longer reacts to noise in this corridor.
entries.gt_1206fb2ef31044: The Heralds' threshold is marked. Hold the door between volleys and take the reward from the edge.
entries.gt_9b14750496dec2: enter only with a marked retreat; the reward lies at the edge
entries.gt_beb4f8e8dc0f3d: The Heralds' threshold remains ahead without a checked retreat.
entries.gt_d640b8d3a616db: The Heralds' threshold is ahead: check the return route from the contact cell, hold the door between volleys, and take the reward from the edge, not the center.
entries.gt_e75928ced8f937: The contact cell warns: at the Heralds' threshold, find the return route first.
entries.gt_029205d524323f: The Meat PSI Storage accepted the meat. Stabilizer issued; Fedot marked you as a payer.
entries.gt_100700b68bd435: Do not open the Voice in a Jar here. The jar calls the storage guards.
entries.gt_2ae93891018274: Fedot Meat-Singer: "Bring four pieces of raw meat. For an honest contribution I will give a stabilizer, but not a reserve for a new life."
entries.gt_414e4922ced039: Meat PSI Storage: ${spec.label}; ${psi}${hp}${guards}. Retreat through the entrance.
entries.gt_44dcc82ee8eb74: The refusal tray issued medicine without tithe. The cult noticed the empty till; a Shadow will appear nearby.
entries.gt_5132f766dca2c2: PSI does not grow here. It is squeezed out, sealed, and spent once.
entries.gt_566569fab91e7d: The wet safe is open. The reserve is yours, but the Voice in a Jar called a crawler, a spirit, and a shadow.
entries.gt_64033316d97096: The wet floor will see the theft: tracks lead from the box straight to you.
entries.gt_735d15fd676267: The guard fell. Storage answers with a PSI hit and releases a beast with a shadow.
entries.gt_8ae9329ccf7b57: Do not touch the hanging meat. It is the till counter: take too much, and the guards will stand up.
entries.gt_a1c2d598c5a672: Wet Safe of the Meat Choir
entries.gt_a9c423ada4705b: PSI is gone. Come back with meat, not a request.
entries.gt_b03762a9ff8fd2: Storage got thinner. That means someone chose a sortie over reserves.
entries.gt_b3dc3f45d5df56: Refusal tray: take medicine without tithe, and you get a PSI hit and a shadow at the door.
entries.gt_c0464e2d1edaa9: Want it honestly? Bring raw meat for the choir. Want it fast? The box is nearby.
entries.gt_da4be10737577f: Invoice: stabilizer for four pieces of raw meat; Voice in a Jar issued only on theft.
entries.gt_1ccd4cc491e0ac: If you wipe the sign away, keep water and a kit ready. The palm often does not come off the first time.
entries.gt_40bdc24760be9b: You can bypass, follow the trace, or wipe the sign. I need a mark on the map, not a pretty corpse.
entries.gt_78b68fad56ce36: Koptev: "The black palm leads to the thin wall {dir}. Reach the end of the trace, mark the place, and decide yourself: bypass it, clean it, or take the cache."
entries.gt_82309bdec7f7a0: At the end there is usually a cache. Someone else's. That is why it is quiet only until the first stolen thing.
entries.gt_a3640c3a64df75: The palm is entered in the log. No conclusion, no theology.
entries.gt_a836246b0a0016: There is a black palm on the floor. Not oil, not soot. A route, if you believe the empty tags by the wall.
entries.gt_af6f906e46cf68: The black palm is entered in the route log.
entries.gt_13a99880657dcd: EVIDENCE: the lamp stays in place. There is no reward, but the doors will stay open and the debt will not appear.
entries.gt_a34484bffc8e81: PROTOCOL: take the Borrowed Light. You immediately receive a stabilizer and two energy cells; the room doors close, and backlash jerks your health.
entries.gt_f3affadd8b2ac1: Receipt: leave the light as evidence
entries.gt_7b2fe121f1c40d: the line lies; the right panel hums more quietly
entries.gt_907d2e73a3294c: The Ekrannik went dark: the fuse came out of the panel.
entries.gt_9adb30866d5628: Screen C kept burning. The eastern passage leads under an eye and a Paragraph.
entries.gt_9b087265ac6214: The Ekrannik went dark with the eye.
entries.gt_a7b472e0fda692: Mark C was bait: the screen led to an open line of fire.
entries.gt_a9a266eceba1cb: Screen C repeats one line. The right panel hums more quietly and leads to the fuse.
entries.gt_aa5c9bfc0c5060: You found the Ekrannik panel. The fuse kills the false route before the shooting.
entries.gt_bab2c36ceff698: The Ekrannik shows mark C. The note says floor ROOF, but the map says VOID.
entries.gt_bc0acbe90cc64e: EKRANNIK: line C lies about ROOF. The map is right: this is VOID. The eastern passage leads under an eye; first, the panel on the right.
entries.gt_c434b108f3e529: The shot is overexposed: the same screen stands by door C, only the eye and the route line are drawn outside the frame.
entries.gt_065357a36438d6: The Maronary source squeals above the siren. If you heard it, you do not have to go. The source is local: leaving, cover, and a broken screen work.
entries.gt_110a4671cab114: The high squeal is recorded. Follow the arrow, and you get a PSI failure; the source can be broken.
entries.gt_2c0ddc36fbe2ad: The non-green bypass worked. The signal stayed behind the wall, and the reward lies on the shelf.
entries.gt_2ea151d85b1da6: dark shelf gives reward without the green signal
entries.gt_40428c1df07442: The non-green bypass worked. The signal stayed behind the wall, and the reward is on the shelf.
entries.gt_4344d5198c203a: The low tone went quiet. The green arrow again leads by the shortest but dangerous route.
entries.gt_4b8f65c3ff68ed: GREEN ROUTE: the arrow leads through delay and PSI failure. Do not check it by sight; leave, break the source, or take the dark shelf.
entries.gt_61ea46909ab80c: Behind the green squeal is a low tone: it leads to the dark shelf, not the arrow.
entries.gt_627e74eb1b8c68: The green source is broken. The squeal switched off; in the glass, the Voice in a Jar remains.
entries.gt_e0965c9f24fc74: You followed the green arrow. Your step slowed, PSI floated, and the monster took your trace.
entries.gt_eb5fb40bae5ae7: Dark Shelf: do not follow the green arrow
entries.gt_1b3b31ebd3d462: The left door 36 is marked with dark chalk: it is a loop with a return mark, not a shortcut.
entries.gt_2d09fc992b2ff6: dark mark closes the side loop
entries.gt_47f5328e4f291d: Note on the back of the diagram: if you got into side room 36, do not argue with the door. Take the normal passage or step on the return mark.
entries.gt_776ec7978bdc72: pale mark leads to anchor room 35/37
entries.gt_85c3f4ed6540c4: The anchor holds two local rearrangements. Take the spike or the diagram, and doors 36 will become ordinary.
entries.gt_8eccddb734cfd1: At the two doors 36, the right one is marked with pale chalk: it leads to anchor room 35/37.
entries.gt_a48baf679bdd30: The left mark led into side room 36. Look for a return mark or a normal exit.
entries.gt_ad5ed077fa255d: The pale door stayed behind. The two doors 36 will keep confusing the route.
entries.gt_ae8240bf39ef99: In chalk: two doors with number 36. The right leads to anchor room 35/37; the left takes time in a side room. The anchor can be torn out.
entries.gt_d0eb2c0b1e7333: The right door led to the anchor. Take the spike or the diagram, and loop 36 will collapse.
entries.gt_ede5d97bf8ab89: The Perestanovshchik Anchor is torn out. The repeated doors became just doors.
entries.gt_f6c3e39a345e77: The dark door stayed behind. The loop did not take time.
entries.gt_09b53e948a7054: Toll accepted: the backpack did not accept the PSI mark.
entries.gt_0d5e15ebc10ab9: RULE: before the direct exit, a mark is required. Bypass the line, pay 5 rubles, or break the anchor. Direct passage without a mark is considered a violation.
entries.gt_39ee31665a1446: The Bailiff's case is already closed.
entries.gt_3d8edfc1c1e344: BYPASS: the mark is placed without payment. The Bailiff does not appear, and the direct exit remains an ordinary door.
entries.gt_5305f801479d4a: The Bailiff's line rings like an office bell: first the mark, then the direct exit.
entries.gt_66e358189dad7a: The Bailiff's line was left without a mark. The direct threshold will count this as a violation.
entries.gt_75231820738833: Bailiff's Rule: before the direct exit, a mark is required: bypass, pay, or break the anchor.
entries.gt_7e45ff89a2f9f4: Violation accepted: the Bailiff took ${taxed.itemName} and closed the direct line.
entries.gt_93968ec1007ad6: You reached the Bailiff's sign. Now the choice is explicit: bypass, pay, violate, or break the anchor.
entries.gt_ba2eda35874b7e: Mark accepted: the Bailiff does not enter the room.
entries.gt_c1245be9df6b1a: VIOLATION: go straight without a mark. The Bailiff takes only a cheap consumable and closes the line, but does not lock the door forever.
entries.gt_c12ce91c69d7b1: rule first: bypass, toll, or anchor
entries.gt_ce6e9ac05951af: Toll accepted: a PSI mark remains on the palm.
entries.gt_dcaf58e94513fe: The protocol anchor is broken. The rule is lifted, but a Paragraph is already carrying the act of breakage.
entries.gt_ef0fda33ee023e: Violation accepted: the Bailiff closed the direct line and came in person.
entries.gt_f4567d8421e1f5: TOLL: remove 5 rubles and receive a PSI mark. Items are not taxed.
entries.gt_e2b587ca0d3e86: P-46: ${protocolNames}. Apply near the target; do not read by the door until you have decided to pay.
entries.gt_0d8ab6c994e98a: The bypass led to the blind scrape. The sample can be taken without a direct look.
entries.gt_264cea99a1af77: The gray bypass stayed aside. The straight corridor leads directly under the source.
entries.gt_28d240a48d6669: You passed along the lower marks without looking at the source.
entries.gt_2f76dd2e3ac345: The reflector is broken. The Gray Watcher became a stain on concrete.
entries.gt_3ae15a2e888ff4: The side lever breaks the mirror. Do not stand in a direct line with the gray stain.
entries.gt_4107698ec33c30: The seroburmalin sample was taken from the blind scrape.
entries.gt_5d0c26a1a388b4: Direct Look at the Gray Watcher
entries.gt_641d02254d6185: DO NOT LOOK STRAIGHT. If you are reading this line from the corridor, it is already too late: move back behind the wall.
entries.gt_7134e8277f3a63: Follow the marks: two steps from the candle, hand along the wall, source stays to the side.
entries.gt_80e00202bcc5d4: lower passage keeps the source to the side
entries.gt_cb67db5cd67b8f: The lower mark shows the bypass: hand along the wall, source to the side, eyes down.
entries.gt_d775ceccd1f1b0: Rumor for NII: the Gray Watcher is handled by route: source to the side, hand along the wall, eyes down.
entries.gt_ea097543172a0a: The Gray Watcher caught a direct look. A shadow rose behind your back.
entries.gt_0396e74e504532: Do not hide a trace for quiet. Close the neighboring passage, and the people behind it will stop answering.
entries.gt_3a14120e72a298: PROTOCOL: seal the selected trace. Pay with sealing wax, an energy cell, or health; the neighboring passage will close.
entries.gt_4dcd149c1212e5: Under the siren, write one action and one price. The door will not accept a long wording.
entries.gt_56d536c0e7daaa: The trace was left as evidence. The door stays open, but disputed.
entries.gt_6287d946fdb1e8: PROTOCOL: leave the selected trace as evidence. The passage will remain open, but a witness will appear.
entries.gt_6548b94f7dc06f: ${targetKey(ctx)}: trace left as evidence, door not sealed.
entries.gt_7f40a99a63c757: The neighboring passage is already closed. They were coughing behind it; now they are silent, and that is on your paper.
entries.gt_802752be934db9: The Black Box prints the trace address. The paper can later be shown to the clerk or the door.
entries.gt_92972184a4374e: Form: leave the trace as evidence
entries.gt_9360d47041f5e5: Backlash: the evidence called a witness.
entries.gt_afff375316ee25: If you seal it, at least I will know which door took me.
entries.gt_b461af3901bf74: The form is short: seal the trace or leave it as evidence. The first option closes the passage; the second calls a witness.
entries.gt_b6ac181dbabc39: Backlash: the neighboring passage closed; people can no longer be heard behind it.
entries.gt_ba282258422e41: The target has already been chosen by the Black Box. Do not run around the floor: look at the number in the note.
entries.gt_c3e95f67d04c43: I opened the landing door for bread. I stepped here, and my apartment stayed behind another handle.
entries.gt_cf05d5163e71e4: I will be returned to the wrong place. But the evidence with the address will remain, and they will search for me by more than rumors.
entries.gt_d73b146a32f62a: TRACE ${targetKey({ world, entities, roomId: room.id, sealContainerId, evidenceContainerId, targetDoorIdx, backlashDoorIdx })}: the target is written on this paper; no need to run around the floor.
entries.gt_faefb6ce42f01a: Seal the trace, and you will pay with sealing wax, a cell, or health. The neighboring passage will close in place.
